sequence.subject: Breaking Down S&OP and IBP Silos in Manufacturing
sequence.message:
As someone with 25 years of experience in optimizing industrial operations across 400+ plants and 30 countries, I've seen firsthand the challenges of S&OP and IBP integration. Manual planning cycles and lack of visibility can hinder even the most efficient manufacturing processes.

This can lead to consequences such as increased inventory costs, reduced forecast accuracy, and decreased supply chain responsiveness. These issues can have a ripple effect, impacting overall business performance and profitability.

I'd like to share a similar success story from the chemical sector, where we helped a company overcome these challenges. Let's discuss this further in a 15-minute call, no commitment required. 
Alberto Munoz Waissen | Agentic Zero | Powered by Dis-Solutions

sequence.message: Hi Alberto, I built an AI agent that integrates S&OP and IBP, deploying on your existing stack with no ERP migration needed. Certified compliance, it identifies and prioritizes supply chain requirements. Try it free with an audit on your real data.
